CREATE TABLE test_numbers (number Int32) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_numbers SELECT number FROM numbers(100);
SELECT groupArraySorted(5)(toString(number)) FROM (SELECT number FROM numbers(5));
SELECT groupArraySorted(10)(number) FROM (SELECT toString(number) AS str FROM test_numbers);
CREATE TABLE test_strings (str String) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT groupArraySorted(10)(str) FROM (SELECT str FROM test_strings) ORDER BY str;
SELECT groupArraySorted(5)(str) FROM (SELECT concat(str, '-suffix') as str FROM test_strings);
CREATE TABLE nested_example (id Int32, value String) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT groupArraySorted(2)(value) FROM (SELECT value FROM nested_example WHERE id <= 5);
SELECT groupArraySorted(10)(number) FROM (SELECT number FROM (SELECT number FROM numbers(100)) AS inner_numbers) AS outer_numbers;
SELECT groupArraySorted(3)(value) FROM (SELECT str AS value FROM (SELECT toString(number) AS str FROM numbers(5))) ORDER BY str;
